name: Fukurokuju
description:
__Height:__ 221 cm (7'3")
__Debut:__ Chapter 931, Episode 925
__Affiliations:__ Kurozumi Family, Beasts Pirates (former); Orochi Oniwabanshu (former), Kozuki Family (former)
__Occupations:__ Ninja, Captain of the Orochi Oniwabanshu (former)
__Origin:__ Wano Country
__Residence:__ Flower Capital, Wano Country

Fukurokuju is a ninja and the previous captain of the Orochi Oniwabanshu, before they joined the Beasts Pirates. He is currently working with Kurozumi Orochi.
